name: BCA Protein Assay

components.name: 1. 准备 BSA 标准品稀释系列
2. 配制 BCA 工作液 (Reagent A:B = 50:1)
3. 96 孔板加样：25 µL 标准品/样品 per well
4. 加 200 µL BCA 工作液到每个孔
8. 标准曲线计算样品浓度
components.note: 四参数拟合或线性回归

notes.en: BCA assay is compatible with up to 5% SDS but not with reducing agents (DTT, β-ME). Standard range: 25-2000 µg/mL. For low-concentration samples, use Micro BCA kit (0.5-20 µg/mL). R² > 0.99 for standard curve. Bradford assay is an alternative (Coomassie binding, 595 nm) but incompatible with detergents.
notes.zh: 比 Bradford 更耐去垢剂（兼容 1% SDS, 1% Triton X-100）。还原剂（DTT, β-ME）和 EDTA 会干扰——需用 BCA Compatible 试剂盒或预稀释。工作液可保持稳定 24 h。样品建议做 1:5 和 1:10 两个稀释度确保在标准曲线范围内。

ref: Smith et al. (1985) Anal Biochem 150:76–85; Thermo Scientific Pierce BCA Protein Assay Kit manual
